wikipedia.title: Chan Chun Sing
wikipedia.extract: Chan Chun Sing is a Singaporean politician and former major-general who is serving as Coordinating Minister for Public Services and Minister for Defence since 2025. A member of the governing People's Action Party (PAP), he has been the Member of Parliament (MP) for the Buona Vista division of Tanjong Pagar Group Representation Constituency (GRC) since 2011.
wikipedia.extract_html: Chan Chun Sing is a Singaporean politician and former major-general who is serving as Coordinating Minister for Public Services and Minister for Defence since 2025. A member of the governing People's Action Party (PAP), he has been the Member of Parliament (MP) for the Buona Vista division of Tanjong Pagar Group Representation Constituency (GRC) since 2011.
